name: aggregator handles 200 rules across 40 files in <500ms (definition-of-done criterion)
command: node -e 'const{execSync}=require("child_process");const start=Date.now();const out=execSync(`bash ${process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rubric/aggregator.sh --root ${process.env.PWD}/tree --format json`,{encoding:"utf8"});const elapsed=Date.now()-start;const r=JSON.parse(out);const ruleCount=r.rules.length;const fileCount=r.files_processed;if(elapsed<500&&ruleCount>=200&&fileCount>=38){process.stderr.write(`ok elapsed=${elapsed}ms rules=${ruleCount} files=${fileCount}\n`)}else{process.stderr.write(`FAIL elapsed=${elapsed}ms rules=${ruleCount} files=${fileCount}\n`);process.exit(1)}'
setup:
mkdir -p tree/google && for i in $(seq 1 40); do f="tree/google/f${i}.yaml"; { printf 'source:
  id: src-%d
  authoritative_publisher: Generated
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/%d
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-11T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:%d
rules:
' "$i" "$i" "$i"; for j in $(seq 1 5); do rid=$(((i-1)*5+j)); printf '  - id: r-%03d
    name: rule-%03d
    description: rule %d.
    detector: rubric/detectors/gen.sh
' "$rid" "$rid" "$rid"; done; printf 'recommended_set: []
all_set: []
'; } > "$f"; done
